channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: WHO and Africa CDC raise alarm over fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has expressed serious concern over the rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak in central Africa, now declared a continental emergency. In the Democratic Republic of Congo...

item.title: Peter Obi, Tinubu, and Makinde Respond to Oyo School Abduction and Teacher’s Death
item.description: Last Friday, bandits invade Esiele community for Oriire Local Government Area, Oyo State, and abduct staff, students, and pupils from Community Grammar School, Baptist Nursery and Primary School, and ...

item.title: Government Forms Special Commission to Investigate October 2025 Election Violence
item.description: Dar es Salaam – President Samia Suluhu Hassan imeunda tume maalumu ya kisheria kuchunguza na kuwachukulia hatua wale wote waliohusika na vurugu zilizotokea baada ya uchaguzi mkuu wa Oktoba 29, 2025. T...

item.title: Practical Tips for Keeping Your Home Clean with Pets
item.description: With shedding season in full swing during mid-to-late May, pet owners often find themselves overwhelmed by hair, dander, and messes around the home. Brushing your pets regularly, especially with a too...

item.title: Northwest Territories Responds to Three Early Wildfires
item.description: The Northwest Territories government is currently managing three wildfires as the wildfire season begins, two of which were caused by human activity. A small human-caused fire in the South Slave regio...

item.title: India maintains Russian oil imports despite US sanction waivers
item.description: India has been procuring Russian crude oil even before the United States issued waivers for such transactions, and it continues to do so, according to Sujata Sharma, Joint Secretary in the Ministry of...

item.title: How NTSA Vehicle Re-registration Works in Kenya: Requirements, Process, and Costs Explained
item.description: The article provides a detailed guide on the NTSA vehicle re-registration process in Kenya, explaining when it is required, the documents needed, the application steps, and associated costs. Vehicle r...

item.title: Nine-year-old recalls hiding during deadly shooting at San Diego mosque
item.description: On Monday morning, a tragic shooting occurred at the Islamic Centre of San Diego, affecting many students at the mosque’s affiliated school. Nine-year-old Odai Shanah, whose mother fled war-torn Gaza ...

item.title: Pep Guardiola to step down as Manchester City manager after ten years in charge
item.description: Pep Guardiola, the 55-year-old Spanish manager, is set to leave Manchester City at the end of the 2025-26 season, concluding a remarkable decade at the club. During his tenure, Guardiola guided City t...

item.title: Maggie Smith’s Film Debut in 1958’s 'Nowhere to Go'
item.description: Maggie Smith, renowned for her later iconic roles as sharp-tongued aristocrats and magical professors, made her film debut at age 23 in Seth Holt's 1958 noir film, Nowhere to Go. Produced by Ealing St...

item.title: Experts Warn Trump’s China Summit Could Increase U.S. Vulnerabilities
item.description: A former senior National Security Council official has raised serious concerns about President Donald Trump's recent summit in Beijing with Chinese President Xi Jinping, arguing that the meeting could...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of the Iconic Bicycle Scene in 'Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid'
item.description: The bicycle scene in the 1969 film 'Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid' remains one of cinema's most memorable stunts, not only for its on-screen charm but also for the behind-the-scenes antics. Filme...

item.title: Observers React to Bruising on President Trump's Hand During White House Event
item.description: On May 18, 2026, during a White House event focused on health care affordability, observers noticed significant bruising on President Donald Trump's hand. The image, which circulated widely on social ...

item.title: Cupido admits Sundowns face tough task in Morocco after narrow first-leg win
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns defender Keanu Cupido has admitted that his team made their path to CAF Champions League glory harder than necessary by failing to score more than one goal in their first-leg victory...

item.title: Pag-IBIG Fund Reports 11% Growth in Q1 2026 Net Income, Strengthening Housing Support for Filipino Workers
item.description: The Pag-IBIG Fund has reported a notable increase in its net income for the first quarter of 2026, reaching P16.772 billion, which is an 11% rise compared to the same period last year. The growth is a...

item.title: IndiGo Vadodara-Delhi Flight Faces Half-Hour Power Outage Before Take-Off
item.description: On Sunday night, passengers onboard IndiGo flight 6E 657 from Vadodara to Delhi experienced a power disruption that left the aircraft without electricity and air conditioning for approximately 30 minu...

item.title: Cebu Court Rules Out Terrorism Charges Against Local NGO
item.description: CEBU, Philippines – A regional court in Cebu City has dismissed the terrorism financing case filed against 27 current and former members of the Community Empowerment Resource Network (CERNET), a local...

item.title: Supreme Court upholds order for removal and sterilisation of stray dogs in public areas
item.description: On May 19, 2026, the Supreme Court of India declined to modify its earlier order from November 7, 2025, which directed all States and Union Territories to remove stray dogs from high-footfall public i...

item.title: DCMS and Channel 4 respond to serious sexual assault allegations on Married at First Sight UK
item.description: The Department for Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS) has described allegations of rape and non-consensual sexual acts on Channel 4's Married at First Sight (MAFS) UK as 'serious', calling for consequenc...

item.title: Expert Warns Trump Event Challenges Separation of Church and State
item.description: During the 'Rededicate 250' event on May 17, 2026, President Donald Trump held a large-scale prayer gathering on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., which has drawn criticism from experts on politi...
